# W16T4 Implementation Plan

## Task Goal
Finish the matrix module surface with final re-exports and end-to-end dot tests.

## Related Design Documents
- `design/12-matrix.md` §3
- `design/12-matrix.md` §8
- `design/12-matrix.md` §9.1

## Dependencies
- W16T2

## Files to Create/Modify
- `src/matrix/mod.rs`
- `tests/test_matrix.rs`

## Implementation Details

### Re-exports
- Keep `src/matrix/mod.rs` limited to the `dot` module and `pub use dot::dot;`.
- Do not export any additional matrix operations.

### Test Coverage
Populate `tests/test_matrix.rs` with the matrix test set defined by `12-matrix.md §8`.

## Test Plan
- `test_dot_basic`
- `test_dot_complex`
- `test_dot_dimension_mismatch`
- `test_dot_empty`
- `test_dot_single_element`
- `test_dot_simd_path_with_feature`
- `test_dot_parallel_path`
- `test_dot_high_rank_invalid_argument`

## Acceptance Criteria
- `tests/test_matrix.rs` covers correctness, shape errors, panic boundaries, and feature-path behavior.
- The matrix module still exports only `dot`.
- No additional matrix APIs are introduced.

## Development Workflow
1. Add the module-level smoke test and integration test file.
2. Fill in baseline correctness and error cases.
3. Add feature-gated SIMD and parallel cases.
4. Re-run the matrix test suite once.
